description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly blue exterior and vibrant, retro-themed artwork on its side panels. The front houses a large display screen with the game 'Donkey Kong' shown, flanked by a control panel equipped with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons for gameplay. The marquee at the top displays 'Nintendo Entertainment System' in red and white, adding to the nostalgic appeal. The side panels are adorned with colorful graphics of iconic arcade characters, including Pac-Man and Donkey Kong, along with the text 'Arcade Classics.' The rear of the cabinet is solid blue with ventilation slats and access screws, indicating a sturdy, enclosed structure. The overall build suggests a combination of wood or MDF for the main body, plastic for the controls and trim, and glass or acrylic for the screen cover.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with blue exterior, retro side panel artwork, and a front control panel featuring joysticks and buttons. The marquee and screen display 'Donkey Kong' and 'Nintendo Entertainment System' branding.
description_view_0: Left side view showing vibrant 'Arcade Classics' artwork with Pac-Man and Donkey Kong characters, and the blue cabinet structure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Donkey Kong' game screen, control panel with joysticks and buttons, and the 'Nintendo Entertainment System' marquee.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical 'Arcade Classics' graphics and blue cabinet body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain blue panel with ventilation slats and screws, no artwork or controls visible.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and six colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a blue background and multicolored button scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'Nintendo Entertainment System' in red and white on a blue background, matching the cabinet's retro theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display colorful 'Arcade Classics' artwork with Pac-Man, Donkey Kong, and other characters, set against a white background with bold, stylized text.
